title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 Nano, Super, and Ultra models. The series employs a hybrid Mamba transformer architecture combined with Latent Mixture of Experts and Mixture of Tokens, differentiating it from other open-source models.
writeup: Caleb Writes Code breaks down NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 open model series, focusing on the architectural choices that set it apart from other open models. The analysis covers three components: Hybrid Mamba, Latent Mixture of Experts, and MTP. The framing situates these against the standard transformer baseline used in large language models.
